headline: Haven Safety AI Named Finalist for EEI's Prestigious Edison Award
summary: Recognition highlights Haven's role in advancing AI-driven safety innovation across the electric power and utilities industry ATLANTA, GA / ACCESS Newswire / May 6, 2026 / Haven Safety AI, an AI-native safety intelligence platform, has been selected ...

headline: Exelon (EXC) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Exelon (EXC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +2.63% and +4.75%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
